---
title: "My Life and What Shall I Do with It?: A Question for Young Gentlewomen By an Old Maid."
---

## My Life and What Shall I Do with It?: A Question for Young Gentlewomen By an Old Maid.

**Author:** Lucy F. March Phillipps
**Date:** 1860
**Imprint:** London: Longman

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
